title: Cash Planning in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger cash planning in practice judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cash Planning in Practice is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Cash Planning in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cash planning in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cash Planning in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
